title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: WALLY'S HOUSE CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community trainings. 94166 8th Street Gold Beach, OR 97444 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 with suspected history of abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 425-5502 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 425-5502 Main phone Main phone (541) 425-5502 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of legal custody AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLY'S HOUSE
